untranslatable_reason: Signal requires P/E ratio < 20 and P/E expansion detection (P/E > 50), plus fundamental quality filters. P/E ratio and fundamental deterioration are NOT in the allowed indicator list. These are data points requiring external fundamental data feeds, not price/technical indicators.
translation_notes: Core concept translated to price momentum (new highs/resistance breakout via close crossing above pivot/sma_50) in a TRENDING regime. However, the signal's essential rules—P/E-based entry filter (≤20) and P/E-based exit (>50)—cannot be expressed with available technical indicators. To fully implement this signal, P/E ratio and fundamental quality scores must be added to the indicator whitelist. The exit on fundamental deterioration also requires fundamental data not available in current indicator set.
